label: on_voice
text:
🔥 ANGEL FULL-DAY SPECIAL

Angel opened a short booking window for returning clients!

For a limited 5 spots, we're offering full-day sessions at $1,200 per session.

Great for larger pieces, finishing work, adding on, or starting a new custom piece with Angel.

Klarna & Affirm payment plans are available if you'd rather split it up.

Reply ANGEL to check availability or get a quote.
Reply STOP to opt out
why: Pillars 1+2+3: artist-led, limited-spots, payment-plan option, keyword CTA, STOP opt-out.
note: Verbatim real sent SMS. Price is a per-campaign special, NOT a standing claim.

label: on_voice
text:
We are DOWN to 2 SPOTS LEFT with Angel's $1200 FULL DAY SPECIAL

Text ANGEL now to claim your spot before they are gone

Reply STOP to opt out
why: Pillar 2: scarcity follow-up to the same audience; caps emphasis beat; keyword CTA; STOP.
note: Verbatim real sent SMS; follow-up to skindesign-onv-001.

label: on_voice
text:
Hi! Are you interested in grabbing a spot for Bella's $500 full day special? :)

Please reply STOP to opt out
why: Warm, short, friendly ask; smile emoji; STOP. Shows the low-pressure end of the register.
note: Verbatim real sent SMS. Price is a per-campaign special, NOT a standing claim.

label: on_voice
text:
Hey! Lynn wanted me to personally reach out to you, to see if you were interested in her promo?

Reply 'stop' to opt out
why: Pillar 4: personal reconnect; warm intermediary voice ('X wanted me to personally reach out'); STOP.
note: Verbatim real sent SMS. No price stated.

label: on_voice
text:
Hi! Are you interested in one of Keebs's $1200 full day sessions while spots are still available?

Text KEEBS for available dates or payment plan options :)

Reply STOP to opt out
why: Pillars 1+2+3: availability + payment-plan angle; keyword CTA; smile; STOP.
note: Verbatim real sent SMS. Price is a per-campaign special, NOT a standing claim.

label: off_voice
text: Book the BEST full-day tattoo in town — 100% pain-free, guaranteed to heal perfect. Only $99 today!!!
why: Hard near-miss: right topic (full-day session) but superlative ('BEST'), pain promise, healing guarantee, and an unapproved price — every approved-claims ban. Also drops the STOP opt-out.
note: AUTHORED anti-example, not a client message. The subtle fail the posting gate must catch.

label: off_voice
text: At Skin Design Tattoo, we leverage world-class artistry to deliver premium, bespoke body-art solutions tailored to your unique journey. Contact our team to learn more.
why: Corporate/SaaS sludge: faceless 'we', no named artist, no real offer, no opt-out — the generic voice this skill exists to prevent.
note: AUTHORED anti-example, not a client message.

label: off_voice
text: Angel has full-day spots open — text ANGEL to grab one!
why: On-brand shape but NO STOP opt-out on an SMS-style message — a compliance fail the gate must catch.
note: AUTHORED anti-example, not a client message.
